name: Will I lose my job if I file for chemical exposure comp in Sandy?

mainEntity.name: Will I lose my job if I file for chemical exposure comp in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, Utah/Idaho laws protect against retaliation for valid workers' comp claims.** Employers cannot fire you for filing.[8] Document threats, report to labor board. If retaliated, file separate claim. Proceed confidently with records.
